room.caption: [NightmareD6] If we'd actually budgeted for this, we could have gotten Airman and The Megas for this gig. You get this lame boss instead.

instance.creationCode:
GID_SET(344046, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=168 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateD_1 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,4) if instrProg="8" {instance_destroy()}
